license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bgatjsen
title: Imaging Mass Cytometry Modality Overview
author: Michelle Daniel

steps_raw.instruction: Process donor organs into samples for analysis. Lymph Node: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bbgnijve https://drive.google.com/drive/my-drive Thymus: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bbgmiju6 Spleen: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bc3kiykw
Register organ donor, organs received, and common coordinate region information in the HuBMAP UUID generator at https://uuid.hubmapconsortium.org
Prepare paraffin blocks from tissue samples. Cassette Processing: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8nzhvf6 Paraffin Embedding: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bam9ic96
Package and send paraffin blocks to the Bodenmiller lab: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bf5njq5e
Conjugate primary antibodies using the Maxpar Antibody Labeling Kit: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bf5jjq4n
Cut and mount paraffin sections for staining and analysis. Sectioning: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfz4jp8w
Antibody staining of paraffin sections for Imaging Mass Cytometry: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfz8jp9w
Prepare a slide to use for compensation: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bf2djqa6
Tune the Image Mass Cytometer for acquisition: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bf2gjqbw
Data Acquisition by Image Mass Cytometry: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bf2ijqce
Load Imaging Mass Cytometry Datasets onto Hipergator: IMC_Transfer Data Zurich to HPG.docx
Prepare and upload data to the HuBMAP HIVE Globus landing pad using Hipergator. IMC Transfer data from Hipergator to HuBMAP HIVE Globus.docx
